name: VLM-AutoYOLO
desc: AI Auto Annotation & YOLO Training Pipeline, End-to-end object detection auto-labeling and YOLO training platform. VLM-powered annotation with NVIDIA LocateAny…
descFull: AI Auto Annotation & YOLO Training Pipeline, End-to-end object detection auto-labeling and YOLO training platform. VLM-powered annotation with NVIDIA LocateAnything-3B, manual refinement, one-click YOLO training, video keyframe extraction, and model validation. Supports image and video.
